script: S=/home/azureuser/aixa-send-to.sh; echo '===== SENDER SCRIPT — tail (lines 40-end) =====' && sed -n '40,$p' $S 2>&1 | nl -ba -v40 && echo && echo '===== chat-blocklist file =====' && B=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/chat-blocklist; if [ -f $B ]; then echo "contents:"; cat $B; else echo "  (file does not exist — nothing blocked)"; fi && echo && echo '===== Is AIXA_TEAMS_CATALOG_ID set in service env? =====' && systemctl show aixa-bot.service -p Environment --value && systemctl show aixa-responder.service -p Environment --value && echo && echo '===== Drop-ins for either service =====' && find /etc/systemd/system/aixa-*.service.d -type f 2>/dev/null && cat /etc/systemd/system/aixa-*.service.d/*.conf 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '===== Check vault for missing secret =====' && az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query "[?contains(name,'aixa') || contains(name,'graph')].name" -o tsv 2>&1 | head -20 && echo && echo '===== Recent Yoo-chat conv id (full) vs outbound chat id (full) =====' && tail -3 /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/activities.jsonl | jq -r '. as $env | (.body|fromjson) | "  conv.id=" + (.conversation.id // "?") + "  type=" + (.conversation.conversationType // "?")' && echo '--- recent outbound chat ids ---' && tail -5 /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/outbound.jsonl | jq -r '"  " + (.chat_id // "?")'
